description: Style NoteOne of the largest menswear Brands in India, park avenue is known for their unflinching dedication towards quality and Fit. Made from premium combed cotton and elastane fabric, this pair of briefs lives up to the brand's ideals. Its stylish waistband and double layered front pouch give you a body enhancing fit. Product DetailsGrey briefs, elasticized waistband with brand patch, double layered front pouch for extra support and comfort, black piping at side-seam, high cut design allows free leg movement, printed branding on the inside offers abrasion-free comfort, bio-washed to soften the fabric and avoid skin irritationMaterial and Care96% cotton and 4% elastaneMachine wash warmDo not ironSize and FitComfit, Regular riseThe model (height 6' and waist 32'') is wearing a size M
